results.title: Nice hail Kojo Peprah Oppong after crucial goal-line clearance on World Cup debut
results.description: French club OGC Nice have praised Ghana defender Kojo Peprah Oppong after his memorable FIFA World Cup debut against England.The 21-year-old was introduced in the 87th minute of Ghana’s goalless draw with England, replacing Marvin Senaya as the Black Stars looked to preserve a valuable point in Group L.Despite his late arrival, Peprah Oppong made [...] The post Nice hail Kojo Peprah Oppong after crucial goal-line clearance on World Cup debut appeared first on Ghana News Online .

results.title: Trump Cancels Housing Bill to Demand SAVE America Act
results.description: President Trump abruptly canceled the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act signing, demanding Congress pass the controversial SAVE America Act first.

results.title: GBA to launch safe footpath campaign from July 1
results.description: The five corporations under the Greater Bengaluru Authority (GBA) will launch a citywide ‘Safe Footpath Campaign’ from July 1 to clear encroachments and improve pedestrian infrastructure across the city, Bengaluru Development Minister Krishna Byre Gowda said. The government has also allocated ₹70 crore for the repair and improvement of nearly 2,000 km of footpaths within GBA limits.

results.title: Ram mandir donation row | What's the difference between Mahmud Ghazni and Modi-Shah, asks K'taka Cong chief
results.description: Amid the controversy over the allegation of Rs 200-crore financial irregularity in the donations made to Ram Mandir in Ayodhya, Karnataka Pradesh Congress Committee (KPCC) president B K Hariprasad on Wednesday sought to know how different Prime Minister Narendra Modi and Union Home Minister Amit Shah are from 11th-century invader Mahmud of Ghazni.
